Ultra-Durable Material: Made from jute + MDF composite, resistant to scratches and wear without shedding, withstands long-term “attacks” from feline claws for maximum value. 2. Interactive Design: Features a built-in jute ball + hanging pom-pom for dual scratching and playtime, satisfying both claw-sharpening and entertainment needs. 3. detail_html:
Name: Vertical Cat Tree


Style: Sisal Edition】Vertical Back Support Scratching Post + Sisal Tassel Toy


Dimensions: 55*34*27cm


Material: Composite Board + Sisal


1. Ultra-Durable Material: Made from jute + MDF composite, resistant to scratches and wear without shedding, withstands long-term “attacks” from feline claws for maximum value.


2. Interactive Design: Features a built-in jute ball + hanging pom-pom for dual scratching and playtime, satisfying both claw-sharpening and entertainment needs.


3. Triangular Stability: Tilted angle aligns with natural scratching habits, stays upright during use for worry-free play.


4. Aesthetic & Functional: Rustic wood finish with cute cat paw/cat cutout accents blends seamlessly into home decor. Serves as both scratching post and stylish accent piece.

Welcome to FurryEar!

Follow the store to receive coupons

If you have any questions, please contact our customer service team🫡

We have a team dedicated to resolving your issues🫡

Thank you!

Product Features:

1.Sturdy and Safe：Bold pillars for stability and safety, allowing cats to jump freely.

2.Thickened Sisal Rope：Thickened pillar sisal rope for a more stable climbing frame, ensuring the safety of cats during play.

3.Crafted with care to solve the owner's troubles, providing a space for cats to play, rest, and giving them a home of their own.

4.Multiple styles to choose from, meeting the needs of different households.

detail_text: 🐾 Cat Tree & Condo Capsule Series – Multi-Level Climbing Playground Durable Sisal Posts | Plush Hammock | Easy to Assemble | SG Seller 🛠️ Assembly: Comes with manual for simple DIY installation. 📏 Refer to product images for dimensions (manual measurements may vary slightly) 🎨 Color shades may differ slightly due to lighting and screen display 🪵 Cat Tree • Color Options: Light Grey / Beige - Weight: 14kg (60x40x140cm) • N1Beige - (40x50x120cm) B12 - (50x60x170cm) • B15 - (40(w) x 141cm(h)) • B15 + Cushion - (40(w) x 141cm(h)) • B16 - (60x40x132cm) • B56 - (50x85x172cm) • B58 - (50x85x170cm) 🐱 Cat Condo Capsule Series Model Height Weight Price Capsule A 135cm 13kg $67.90 Capsule B 132cm 10kg $49.90 Capsule C 165cm 14kg $67.90 ✅ Product Highlights: ✔️ Multi-Deck Playground • Features elevated platforms, ramps, and rest areas — perfect for cats to jump, climb, and nap ✔️ Comfort Meets Function • Built-in cat house, hammock, and perches offer cozy resting zones ✔️ Durable Sisal-Wrapped Posts • Satisfies scratching instincts while protecting your furniture ✔️ Plush-Lined Surfaces • Covered with soft quality plush for warmth and comfort ✔️ Strong & Stable Build • Made from natural sisal + high-density flake board • Ideal for one or multiple cats ✔️ Compact Footprint, Big Entertainment • Great for any room – apartment, bedroom, or living area Let your cat climb, scratch, nap, and play — all in one stylish tower! 🐾🪵🐈
detail_html:
🐾 Cat Tree & Condo Capsule Series – Multi-Level Climbing Playground

Durable Sisal Posts | Plush Hammock | Easy to Assemble | SG Seller

🛠️ Assembly:

Comes with manual for simple DIY installation.

📏 Refer to product images for dimensions (manual measurements may vary slightly)

🎨 Color shades may differ slightly due to lighting and screen display

🪵 Cat Tree

• Color Options: Light Grey / Beige - Weight: 14kg (60x40x140cm)

• N1Beige - (40x50x120cm)

B12 - (50x60x170cm)

• B15 - (40(w) x 141cm(h))

• B15 + Cushion - (40(w) x 141cm(h))

• B16 - (60x40x132cm)

• B56 - (50x85x172cm)

• B58 - (50x85x170cm)

🐱 Cat Condo Capsule Series

Model Height Weight Price

Capsule A 135cm 13kg $67.90

Capsule B 132cm 10kg $49.90

Capsule C 165cm 14kg $67.90

✅ Product Highlights:

✔️ Multi-Deck Playground

• Features elevated platforms, ramps, and rest areas — perfect for cats to jump, climb, and nap

✔️ Comfort Meets Function

• Built-in cat house, hammock, and perches offer cozy resting zones

✔️ Durable Sisal-Wrapped Posts

• Satisfies scratching instincts while protecting your furniture

✔️ Plush-Lined Surfaces

• Covered with soft quality plush for warmth and comfort

✔️ Strong & Stable Build

• Made from natural sisal + high-density flake board

• Ideal for one or multiple cats

✔️ Compact Footprint, Big Entertainment

• Great for any room – apartment, bedroom, or living area

Let your cat climb, scratch, nap, and play — all in one stylish tower! 🐾🪵🐈

product.desc:
🐾 Cat Tree & Condo Capsule Series – Multi-Level Climbing Playground

Durable Sisal Posts | Plush Hammock | Easy to Assemble | SG Seller

🛠️ Assembly:

Comes with manual for simple DIY installation.

📏 Refer to product images for dimensions (manual measurements may vary slightly)

🎨 Color shades may differ slightly due to lighting and screen display

🪵 Cat Tree

• Color Options: Light Grey / Beige - Weight: 14kg (60x40x140cm)

• N1Beige - (40x50x120cm)

B12 - (50x60x170cm)

• B15 - (40(w) x 141cm(h))

• B15 + Cushion - (40(w) x 141cm(h))

• B16 - (60x40x132cm)

• B56 - (50x85x172cm)

• B58 - (50x85x170cm)

🐱 Cat Condo Capsule Series

Model Height Weight Price

Capsule A 135cm 13kg $67.90

Capsule B 132cm 10kg $49.90

Capsule C 165cm 14kg $67.90

✅ Product Highlights:

✔️ Multi-Deck Playground

• Features elevated platforms, ramps, and rest areas — perfect for cats to jump, climb, and nap

✔️ Comfort Meets Function

• Built-in cat house, hammock, and perches offer cozy resting zones

✔️ Durable Sisal-Wrapped Posts

• Satisfies scratching instincts while protecting your furniture

✔️ Plush-Lined Surfaces

• Covered with soft quality plush for warmth and comfort

✔️ Strong & Stable Build

• Made from natural sisal + high-density flake board

• Ideal for one or multiple cats

✔️ Compact Footprint, Big Entertainment

• Great for any room – apartment, bedroom, or living area

Let your cat climb, scratch, nap, and play — all in one stylish tower! 🐾🪵🐈

title: Wall Mount Cat Hammock / Cat Tree / Cat House / Cat Scratching Pole / Scratcher / Cat Cage / Hanging Hammock / Hanging Platform / Cat Rest Bed / Cat Condo / Cat Tree / Cat House / Cat Scratching Board / Scratching Tree
detail_text: Elevate your cat's living space with our beautifully crafted, wall-mounted cat playgrounds. Designed to engage a cat's natural instincts for climbing, scratching, and exploring, these setups maximize vertical space and add a unique aesthetic to any room. Perfect for creating a stimulating and cozy environment, each component is thoughtfully designed to offer a blend of adventure and relaxation. ⭐Key Features⭐ 🐈Multi-Level Playgrounds: Multiple levels with platforms, ladders, and bridges encourage active play and exploration, keeping cats entertained and physically fit. 🐈Cozy Condos and Hideaways: Includes enclosed condos and hideaway spaces, providing cats with secure spots to rest, relax, and observe from a comfortable height. 🐈Transparent Observation Bubbles: Unique bubble windows allow cats to enjoy an expanded view of their surroundings, appealing to their curiosity and need for mental stimulation. 🐈Scratch-Friendly Elements: Integrated scratching posts and durable materials cater to cats’ need to scratch, helping to protect your furniture and provide enrichment. 🐈Space-Saving Design: Wall-mounted installation saves floor space, making it ideal for compact homes or apartments while enhancing the room's decor. 🐈High-Quality Craftsmanship: Made from durable, cat-safe materials and crafted to blend naturally into any room’s interior, adding a touch of style along with function.
detail_html:
Elevate your cat's living space with our beautifully crafted, wall-mounted cat playgrounds. Designed to engage a cat's natural instincts for climbing, scratching, and exploring, these setups maximize vertical space and add a unique aesthetic to any room. Perfect for creating a stimulating and cozy environment, each component is thoughtfully designed to offer a blend of adventure and relaxation.

⭐Key Features⭐

🐈Multi-Level Playgrounds: Multiple levels with platforms, ladders, and bridges encourage active play and exploration, keeping cats entertained and physically fit.

🐈Cozy Condos and Hideaways: Includes enclosed condos and hideaway spaces, providing cats with secure spots to rest, relax, and observe from a comfortable height.

🐈Transparent Observation Bubbles: Unique bubble windows allow cats to enjoy an expanded view of their surroundings, appealing to their curiosity and need for mental stimulation.

🐈Scratch-Friendly Elements: Integrated scratching posts and durable materials cater to cats’ need to scratch, helping to protect your furniture and provide enrichment.

🐈Space-Saving Design: Wall-mounted installation saves floor space, making it ideal for compact homes or apartments while enhancing the room's decor.

🐈High-Quality Craftsmanship: Made from durable, cat-safe materials and crafted to blend naturally into any room’s interior, adding a touch of style along with function.

title: 3 in 1 Cat Scratcher House Hideout, Corrugated Paper Scratch Board with Toy Cat Tree Cat Condo
detail_text: Product information Features: 1.The square enclosed solid wood cat house ensures the sense of security that cats want and also satisfies their curiosity. 2.Cat claws grow very quickly, which can affect walking and can easily injure people. Therefore, cats will use bed sheets and sofas as places to grind their claws. This product uses high-grade corrugated paper to satisfy cats’ claw-grinding instinct. 3.The combination of screw fixation makes the cat nest more sturdy and durable. Can be used by multiple cats to play together. Product name: Square Forest Cabin Product material: Wood + Corrugated Paper
detail_html:
Product information
Features:
1.The square enclosed solid wood cat house ensures the sense of security that cats want and also satisfies their curiosity.
2.Cat claws grow very quickly, which can affect walking and can easily injure people. Therefore, cats will use bed sheets and sofas as places to grind their claws. This product uses high-grade corrugated paper to satisfy cats’ claw-grinding instinct.
3.The combination of screw fixation makes the cat nest more sturdy and durable. Can be used by multiple cats to play together.
Product name: Square Forest Cabin
Product material: Wood + Corrugated Paper

detail_blocks.text: Product information Features: 1.The square enclosed solid wood cat house ensures the sense of security that cats want and also satisfies their curiosity. 2.Cat claws grow very quickly, which can affect walking and can easily injure people. Therefore, cats will use bed sheets and sofas as places to grind their claws. This product uses high-grade corrugated paper to satisfy cats’ claw-grinding instinct. 3.The combination of screw fixation makes the cat nest more sturdy and durable. Can be used by multiple cats to play together. Product name: Square Forest Cabin Product material: Wood + Corrugated Paper

page_json.description: Product information. Features: 1. The square enclosed solid wood cat house ensures the sense of security that cats want and also satisfies their curiosity. 2. Cat claws grow very quickly, which can affect walking and can easily injure people. Therefore, cats will use bed sheets and sofas as places to grind their claws. This product uses high-grade corrugated paper to satisfy cats claw-grinding instinct. 3. The combination of screw fixation makes the cat nest more sturdy and durable. title: Small Cat Tree Tower with Perch Bed Scratching Post Cat Scratching Post Multipurpose Training Toy Condo Cat Scratcher
detail_text: Product Features: 【4-in-1 Multi-Functional Wooden Cat Tower】 This wooden cat tower combines play, rest, scratching, and climbing in one design. Perfect for active kittens or lazy adult cats, this tree for cats offers endless fun and comfort, making it their favorite cat’s house and hangout spot. An essential piece of cat accessories for any home. 【Interactive Cat Toys & Play Design】 Equipped with three hanging ball cat toys, a sisal rope teaser stick, and a durable cat scratching post to satisfy your cat’s natural hunting and scratching instincts. Wear-resistant and shed-free, this scratcher house helps protect your sofas and furniture from damage. 【All-Season Cozy Cat Bed】 The spacious cat’s house bed is made with soft, skin-friendly fabric—warm in winter and breathable in summer. Its ergonomic design fits your cat’s body curve perfectly, giving them a snug and safe sleeping experience all year round. Ideal for both kittens and large cats. 【Stable & Safe Cat Climbing Structure】 Supported by three thickened posts with an upgraded anti-tip design, this scratching post cat tower ensures stability and safety. Even heavy cats can climb, jump, and rest without wobbling—making it the perfect cat climbing and play station. 【Spacious Cat Nest & Rest Area】 Designed for cats who love curling up, this roomy nest in the wooden cat tower allows your pet to stretch or snuggle comfortably. A must-have among cats products for providing security and comfort at home.
detail_html:
Product Features:

【4-in-1 Multi-Functional Wooden Cat Tower】 This wooden cat tower combines play, rest, scratching, and climbing in one design. Perfect for active kittens or lazy adult cats, this tree for cats offers endless fun and comfort, making it their favorite cat’s house and hangout spot. An essential piece of cat accessories for any home.

【Interactive Cat Toys & Play Design】 Equipped with three hanging ball cat toys, a sisal rope teaser stick, and a durable cat scratching post to satisfy your cat’s natural hunting and scratching instincts. Wear-resistant and shed-free, this scratcher house helps protect your sofas and furniture from damage.

【All-Season Cozy Cat Bed】 The spacious cat’s house bed is made with soft, skin-friendly fabric—warm in winter and breathable in summer. Its ergonomic design fits your cat’s body curve perfectly, giving them a snug and safe sleeping experience all year round. Ideal for both kittens and large cats.

【Stable & Safe Cat Climbing Structure】 Supported by three thickened posts with an upgraded anti-tip design, this scratching post cat tower ensures stability and safety. Even heavy cats can climb, jump, and rest without wobbling—making it the perfect cat climbing and play station.

【Spacious Cat Nest & Rest Area】 Designed for cats who love curling up, this roomy nest in the wooden cat tower allows your pet to stretch or snuggle comfortably. A must-have among cats products for providing security and comfort at home.

Wear-resistant and shed-free, this scratcher house helps protect your sofas and furniture from damage. 【All-Season Cozy Cat Bed】 The spacious cat’s house bed is made with soft, skin-friendly fabric—warm in winter and breathable in summer. Its ergonomic design fits your cat’s body curve perfectly, giving them a snug and safe sleeping experience all year round. Ideal for both kittens and large cats. 【Stable & Safe Cat Climbing Structure】 Supported by three thickened posts with an upgraded anti-tip design, this scratching post cat tower ensures stability and safety. Even heavy cats can climb, jump, and rest without wobbling—making it the perfect cat climbing and play station. 【Spacious Cat Nest & Rest Area】 Designed for cats who love curling up, this roomy nest in the wooden cat tower allows your pet to stretch or snuggle comfortably. A must-have among cats products for providing security and comfort at home.

title: [TALL CAT CONDO]Cat Scratching Tree with Hammock/ Cat Condo/ Tree house/Cat Toys/ Cat Scratching post/ Cat Condo Pet Cat Condo / Cat hammock /Cat toys/ cat scratcher post /cat cage / hanging hammock / hanging platform / cat condo / cat rest bed
detail_text: 🐱 Cat Condo 🐱 A cat condo is a multi-level structure designed specifically for cats, providing them with places to climb, scratch, hide, and rest. Typically constructed from wood, carpet, and sisal rope, cat condos often feature platforms, cubbyholes, and scratching posts. They come in various sizes and configurations to suit different spaces and cat needs, offering an enriching environment for indoor cats. 🐱 Benefits of a Cat Condo 🐱 ❤️ Provides Exercise: Multiple levels encourage climbing, jumping, and physical activity. ❤️ Offers Scratching Surfaces: Helps maintain healthy claws and prevents damage to furniture. ❤️ Creates a Safe Space: Cats can hide or retreat to cubbyholes for comfort and security. ❤️ Promotes Mental Stimulation: Engages cats with varying levels and surfaces, reducing boredom. ❤️ Reduces Stress: Cats can observe their environment from elevated perches, which provides a sense of control and reduces anxiety. ❤️ Supports Healthy Sleep Habits: Soft platforms offer cozy spots for rest and relaxation. #CatCondo #CatHouse #CatTree #FelineFurniture #CatPlayground #CatLovers #PetFurniture #CatScratchingPost #CatTower #CatHaven #ModernCatFurniture #CatLife #CatRestArea #MultiLevelCatCondo #CozyCatNook #InteractiveCatTree #CatClimbingTower #LuxuryCatHouse #CatFurnitureDesign #HappyCats
detail_html:
🐱 Cat Condo 🐱

A cat condo is a multi-level structure designed specifically for cats, providing them with places to climb, scratch, hide, and rest. Typically constructed from wood, carpet, and sisal rope, cat condos often feature platforms, cubbyholes, and scratching posts. They come in various sizes and configurations to suit different spaces and cat needs, offering an enriching environment for indoor cats.

🐱 Benefits of a Cat Condo 🐱

❤️ Provides Exercise: Multiple levels encourage climbing, jumping, and physical activity.

❤️ Offers Scratching Surfaces: Helps maintain healthy claws and prevents damage to furniture.

❤️ Creates a Safe Space: Cats can hide or retreat to cubbyholes for comfort and security.

❤️ Promotes Mental Stimulation: Engages cats with varying levels and surfaces, reducing boredom.

❤️ Reduces Stress: Cats can observe their environment from elevated perches, which provides a sense of control and reduces anxiety.

❤️ Supports Healthy Sleep Habits: Soft platforms offer cozy spots for rest and relaxation.

【7th floor platform and spacious guest rooms】Cats are very curious and active. In order to prevent them from being injured due to excessive height differences during the jump, we designed a 7-level platform with relatively even intervals. In addition, we installed a spacious room to protect the pets' privacy and provide them with a safe place to sleep


【Sisal Rope Post】Kitten’s claws are soft and tender. In order to protect their claws from scratches, each post is tightly wrapped with high-quality sisal rope, making it convenient for your pet to climb or sharpen their claws daily.


【Sturdy and Stable Structure】Our cat climbing frame has an ultra-sturdy structure, the weight of all columns and platforms is evenly distributed, and the cat climbing frame can bear up to 30kg of cats. This way, cats can jump off the cat climbing frame safely and easily. It is not easy to wear and deform, ensuring a long service life of the cat climbing frame.


【Assembly Steps】As can be seen from the simple appearance, our cat climbing frame has no tedious assembly steps and fragmentary accessories. As long as you strictly follow the assembly instructions for each part, you can quickly and easily get an exquisite cat tree


【Our Promise】If you have any questions or you are not satisfied, please feel free to contact me, guaranteed full refund or free replacement.
